Speaker.rawBytes: EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E4 BC 8A E7 B9 94 20 E9 A0 86 E5 B9 B3
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B2 B3 E7 BE BD 20 E3 82 86 E3 81 8B E3 82 8A
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B1 B1 E5 B2 B8 20 E9 A2 A8 E8 8A B1
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E7 9C 9F E7 94 B0 20 E6 98 8E E5 BD A6
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E6 A1 90 E6 9D A1 20 E7 BE 8E E9 B6 B4
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 A4 A9 E7 94 B0 20 E4 B9 BE

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The operation is over. Or should I say, "Mission complete."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I believe a celebration is in order.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Huh. I wonder if Aigis-san can even get hungry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Sooo, Kirijo-senpai... You're gonna help us with the victory party tomorrow, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You certainly don't waste any time. Well, I do suppose we've earned it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Well, I've got dibs on the halibut and sea urchin![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Oh, uh, then I call the fatty tuna![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}O-Oh, we're divvying it up already? Um, can I get the salmon roe then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Hey, wait a minute... You can't do that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I reserve the fatty tuna, bluefin, shrimp, squid, scallops... and sea eel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Hey! That's not fair! You don't even eat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Mitsuru-san, please order tamago for me. They say you can tell a chef's skill by how he prepares eggs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}A chef's skill? Geez, how old are you again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Okay, okay. I'll have the very best delivered tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}You mean it!? Aw man, I'm so glad I'm still alive![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Junpei, you can have the leftover dried gourd roll.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}What!? But it was my idea in the first place![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}...I guess it's time to say goodbye to the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Even though it seemed like a curse, for some reason I feel sad to see it go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}We've saved the world, even if no one knows it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Dark Hour has come to an end...[n]{f 1 1}
